title: Control record
description: A single criterion in the CSAT catalog, traceable to one or more source frameworks. Engine and app read these records; disposition and scoring logic never hardcodes an individual control (design principle 1).

sov_domain.description: SOV-7 (security) is inheritance-only per the charter: records in this domain must have disposition_default = inherit. SOV-8 is out of scope and must not appear.

criterion_type.description: C3A distinguishes baseline Criteria from Additional Criteria.

assurance_level.description: CADA Annex II Union assurance level this record instantiates (UA-1..UA-4 are cumulative — a higher level's provider must also meet every lower level's criteria). Phase 2c addition; only used by CADA-derived records.

localization_level.description: C3A localization tier this record instantiates, where applicable. C1 generalizes to {TRUSTED_REGION}, C2 to {NATION}.

layer.description: Layer in the responsibility map this control addresses. Used by the disposition engine and by invariant I2 (no rendered question references a party/layer absent from the persona's map).

derivation.description: Provenance tier. editorial records MUST have a corresponding docs/DECISIONS.md entry (working rule 9).

source_refs.description: Exact framework + section/criterion IDs this record traces to (transparency principle 2). Empty only permitted when derivation = editorial, and then only alongside a DECISIONS.md entry.

status.description: Flags CADA obligations tied to draft legislation, per charter source-framework note 3.

source_text.description: Verbatim source passage, keyed by language. License care (transparency principle 7): C3A is CC-BY-ND 4.0. Omit this field and use source_pointer instead unless verbatim reproduction has been confirmed permissible and logged in docs/DECISIONS.md.

source_pointer.description: Reference to the official source document/section, sufficient to locate the passage without reproducing it. Required on every record regardless of whether source_text is also present, so a record remains traceable even if source_text is later stripped before publication.

generalized_text.description: Question/criterion text with {NATION}/{TRUSTED_REGION}/{PROVIDER} placeholders substituted per the documented substitution rules. Required for all derivation tiers except raw verbatim-only extraction records.

placeholders_used.description: Placeholders present in generalized_text, checked against invariant I3 (no unresolved placeholders in rendered text).

disposition_default.description: Fallback disposition absent any matching disposition rule. Actual disposition is computed per-assessment by the responsibility-map engine (design principle 3) and may differ.

negotiation_opportunity.description: Whether this control carries a model contract-clause suggestion (cross-cutting flag, see Dispositions section).

negotiation_clause.description: Model contract clause language. Required when negotiation_opportunity is true (checked by invariant I5).

evidence_quality_options.description: Which evidence tiers are applicable to this control, ordered weakest to strongest.

weight.description: Base weight before outcome-derived domain weighting and renormalization for suppressed controls.

needs_review.description: Set true whenever extraction is ambiguous. Never guess (working rule 2).

needs_review_note.description: Required when needs_review is true: explains the ambiguity.

allOf.description: editorial records need no source_refs entries but must still carry the array (possibly empty) — enforced structurally; the DECISIONS.md linkage is enforced by validate.py, not by schema.
